---
title: "R Script Format"
author: "S.C. McClelland"
date: "2026-02-24"
output: html_document
---

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(echo = TRUE)
```

## Overview


## Script design

The analyses for this project are highly repetitive. Thus, a basic script should
be created that can take different management change scenarios ('scenario' column in 
the data input files) as an argument. This will ensure consistent handling and
treatment across all the management scenarios.

```{r arguments}

```

## File header

```{r header}

```


## Libraries

```{r libs}
library(data.table)
library(rstudioapi)
```


## Organization
